name: Chicken with Sun-Dried Tomatoes & Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the chicken breasts into 3 pieces. Season with salt and pepper.
2. Heat butter in a skillet over medium heat. Add chicken and sauté until lightly browned on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
3. Remove chicken from the skillet and set aside. Add shallot to the same skillet and sauté until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
4. Return the chicken to the skillet. Stir in cream, white wine, Cajun poultry seasoning, and sun-dried tomatoes.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil and stir until the sauce thickens slightly.
6. Simmer for an additional 2-3 minutes, coating the chicken with the sauce.
7. Serve hot over pasta.
